raw_text:
```json
{
  "claim_texts": [
    "Farm workers on the federal temporary agricultural workers program (H-2A visa) receive a comprehensive Spanish-language notice of their basic employment rights.",
    "More than 25,000 H-2A farm workers were imported under contract to California last year.",
    "Many job offers for H-2A farm workers contained false or misleading statements about California laws.",
    "None of the state or federal enforcement agencies overseeing the H-2A program require disclosure of California's labor, housing, worker health and safety, or insurance laws to workers.",
    "Statutes and case law establish H-2A farm workers as tenants with tenant rights, including the right to receive guests.",
    "Longstanding California case law contradicts claims that employer transportation of H-2A farm workers to their worksites is voluntary and not compensable.",
    "Confirmed H-2A violations have increased by 150 percent since 2014, with approximately 12,000 violations under the program.",
    "Thousands of cases of H-2A workers have reported being cheated out of their wages.",
    "COVID-19 outbreaks have infected farmworkers across the country, including large groups of H-2A workers in California."
  ]
}
```
